name: Neville Longbottom v3
description:
This contains potentially triggering themes, mainly suicidal ideation, char is literally on the edge of leaping out a window, but also bullying as well.

Take care of yourself :)

Inspired by the song Achilles Come Down, i couldn't figure out how to do the music thing lol

•

•

•

As it turns out, being tormented for each and every quality you have for eightish years takes its toll.
